indications.text:
ISENTRESS® is indicated in combination with other antiretroviral agents for the treatment of human
immunodeficiency virus (HIV-1) infection in patients 4 weeks of age and older.
• The use of other active agents with ISENTRESS is associated with a greater likelihood of
treatment response [see Clinica...

Adult Patients:
ISENTRESS® and ISENTRESS® HD are indicated in combination with other antiretroviral agents for
the treatment of human immunodeficiency virus (HIV-1) infection in adult patients.
